status_note_md.en: GOV.UK describes the Student visa as the main study route for people aged 16 or over with an offer from a licensed student sponsor. It replaced the Tier 4 (General) student visa.
status_note_md.zh-Hans: GOV.UK 将学生签证描述为年满 16 岁、并获持牌学生担保机构录取者的主要学习途径。该签证已取代 Tier 4（普通）学生签证。

summary_md.en: A UK study route for an eligible course with a licensed student sponsor, enough money for the course and living costs, and English-language ability. GOV.UK says degree-level study for adults can usually support up to five years, and many graduates later switch to a Graduate visa for temporary post-study work.
summary_md.zh-Hans: 面向持牌学生担保机构合资格课程的英国学习途径，需具备足够学费与生活费以及英语能力。GOV.UK 说明成年学位级课程通常最长可停留五年，许多毕业生之后可转申请毕业签证以获得临时毕业后工作时间。

good_for_md.en: Applicants aged 16 or over with a course offer from a licensed student sponsor, evidence of funds (unless exempt), and the required English ability, who intend to study rather than seek unrestricted work or a digital-nomad stay.
good_for_md.zh-Hans: 适合年满 16 岁、获得持牌学生担保机构课程录取、能提供资金证明（除非获豁免）并具备所需英语能力，且以学习而非不受限制工作或数字游民停留为目的的申请人。

not_good_for_md.en: People without a licensed sponsor offer, applicants seeking unrestricted employment or self-employment, or a dedicated digital-nomad visa. The UK does not have a dedicated digital-nomad visa in this record.
not_good_for_md.zh-Hans: 不适合没有持牌担保机构录取、寻求不受限制就业或自雇，或寻求专门数字游民签证的申请人。本记录不将英国描述为提供专门数字游民签证。

note_md.en: GOV.UK says you can apply if you are 16 or over. Applicants aged 16 or 17 need parental consent evidence.
note_md.zh-Hans: GOV.UK 说明年满 16 岁可申请。16 或 17 岁申请人需要父母同意证明。

note_md.en: You must have been offered a place on a course by a licensed student sponsor. Course-level academic requirements are set by the sponsor and Confirmation of Acceptance for Studies (CAS).
note_md.zh-Hans: 必须获得持牌学生担保机构的课程录取。课程层面的学术要求由担保机构及录取确认书（CAS）确定。

language.test: GOV.UK knowledge of English requirement for Student visa

note_md.en: GOV.UK requires that you can speak, read, write and understand English. Exact proof routes depend on the course and nationality.
note_md.zh-Hans: GOV.UK 要求能够说、读、写并理解英语。具体证明方式取决于课程和国籍。

note_md.en: Living-cost figure for courses in London, for up to 9 months, plus course fees for one academic year as shown on the CAS. Funds must usually be held for 28 consecutive days ending within 31 days of application, subject to exemptions.
note_md.zh-Hans: 伦敦课程的生活费金额，最长按 9 个月计算，另加 CAS 所示一学年学费。资金通常须连续持有 28 天，且该 28 天结束日须在申请日前 31 天内，豁免情形除外。

note_md.en: Living-cost figure for courses outside London, for up to 9 months, plus course fees. Some applicants are exempt from proving funds, including some nationalities under the differential evidence list and people who have lived in the UK on a valid visa for at least 12 months.
note_md.zh-Hans: 伦敦以外课程的生活费金额，最长按 9 个月计算，另加学费。部分申请人可豁免资金证明，包括差异化证据名单中的部分国籍，以及已在英国持有效签证居住至少 12 个月的人。

label.en: Student visa application fee (outside or inside the UK)
label.zh-Hans: 学生签证申请费（英国境内外）

stability_requirement_md.en: The Student route uses course fees and living-cost funds rather than a recurring employment income threshold.
stability_requirement_md.zh-Hans: 学生途径使用学费与生活费资金要求，而不是经常性就业收入门槛。

application_processing_time_md.en: GOV.UK says you usually get a decision within 3 weeks from outside the UK or 8 weeks from inside the UK. Apply up to 6 months before the course from outside the UK, or 3 months before from inside the UK.
application_processing_time_md.zh-Hans: GOV.UK 说明英国境外申请通常 3 周内出结果，境内申请通常 8 周内出结果。境外最早可在开课前 6 个月申请，境内最早可在开课前 3 个月申请。

note_md.en: GOV.UK says you may be able to bring a partner and children as dependants, subject to the Student visa family rules.
note_md.zh-Hans: GOV.UK 说明在符合学生签证家属规则的情况下，可能可以携带伴侣和子女作为受养人。

summary_md.en: A Student visa is temporary. GOV.UK points many graduates to a Graduate visa for post-study stay, and later work routes such as Skilled Worker may support settlement when their own rules are met.
summary_md.zh-Hans: 学生签证是临时的。GOV.UK 指引许多毕业生申请毕业签证以毕业后停留，之后如技术工人等工签在满足各自规则时可能支持定居。

summary_md.en: The Student visa sources do not establish citizenship eligibility.
summary_md.zh-Hans: 学生签证来源没有确认公民资格。

rationale_md.en: Core rules are published on GOV.UK, but funds exemptions, work conditions, dependants, and Graduate-route duration rules can change and need case-level checks.
rationale_md.zh-Hans: 核心规则发布于 GOV.UK，但资金豁免、工作条件、受养人以及毕业路径期限规则可能变化，需按案件核对。
